resources.string: HaramVeil monitors the visible app UI to detect high-risk content on device.
Keeps the veil overlay ready to respond when HaramVeil blocks content.
The veil is standing by to cover blocked apps and enforce lockdowns.
Was your first school in Karachi?
Do you have a sibling older than you?
Is your father\'s name starting with the letter M?
Did you complete your first year of DAE?
Were you born in the same city where you live now?
Did you learn to ride a bicycle before age 10?
Do you have a left-handed family member?
Was your first close friend from your neighborhood?
Did you memorize a surah before age 12?
